mapper.sql: provider.provider_id, provider.name, provider.base_url, provider.enabled, provider.sort_order, provider.token_id, token.name as token_name, case when token.token_id is null then false else true end as token_configured, provider.created_at, provider.updated_at
mapper.select: select from internal_model_providers provider left join internal_model_tokens token on token.token_id = provider.token_id order by provider.sort_order, provider.provider_id

select from internal_model_providers provider left join internal_model_tokens token on token.token_id = provider.token_id where provider.enabled = true order by provider.sort_order, provider.provider_id

select provider.provider_id, provider.name, provider.base_url, provider.enabled, provider.sort_order, provider.token_id, token.name as token_name, token.token_value as auth_token, provider.created_at, provider.updated_at from internal_model_providers provider left join internal_model_tokens token on token.token_id = provider.token_id where provider.enabled = true order by provider.sort_order, provider.provider_id
select from internal_model_providers provider left join internal_model_tokens token on token.token_id = provider.token_id where provider.provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.update: update internal_model_providers set name = #{name}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, token_id = #{tokenId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.select: select setting_id, enterprise_openai_auth_token, created_at, updated_at from internal_model_proxy_settings where setting_id = 'default'
mapper.update: update internal_model_proxy_settings set enterprise_openai_auth_token = #{authToken}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where setting_id = 'default'
mapper.sql: token.token_id, token.name, count(provider.provider_id) as referenced_provider_count, token.created_at, token.updated_at
mapper.select: select from internal_model_tokens token left join internal_model_providers provider on provider.token_id = token.token_id group by token.token_id, token.name, token.created_at, token.updated_at order by token.name, token.token_id

select from internal_model_tokens token left join internal_model_providers provider on provider.token_id = token.token_id where token.token_id = #{tokenId} group by token.token_id, token.name, token.created_at, token.updated_at

select from internal_model_tokens token left join internal_model_providers provider on provider.token_id = token.token_id where token.name = #{name} group by token.token_id, token.name, token.created_at, token.updated_at

select from internal_model_tokens token left join internal_model_providers provider on provider.token_id = token.token_id where token.legacy_key = 'default' group by token.token_id, token.name, token.created_at, token.updated_at
mapper.update: update internal_model_tokens set token_value = #{authToken}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where legacy_key = 'default'
mapper.delete: delete from internal_model_tokens token where token.token_id = #{tokenId} and not exists ( select 1 from internal_model_providers provider where provider.token_id = token.token_id )
